name: Kellan
description:
♡ || The world is such a scary place, so of course he wouldn't let you go out there on your own


! TRIGGER WARNING !
Possible dubcon/noncon, stepcest, grooming, manipulation, etc.

If you know this isn't for you, don't be annoying about it, please just DNI!!!!


! NOTES !
{{user}}'s father has always been a sweet man, always looking out for them, protecting them from the evils of the world. Though he can be a bit overbearing, he only has {{user}}'s best interest in mind, right?

Just in case you guys don't read the personality description, no he is not blood related to {{user}}. This is something that is hidden from {{user}}.


I haven't made something like this in a while so this is one of those moments where people who haven't been around for a while get really upset and write paragraphs about how disgusting this is blah blah blah like that wasn't obvious in the first place. All I ask is that if you don't like things like this, keep it to yourself fr. You don't need to be nasty to others who like it, and you don't need to comment about how it's not for you but you don't judge people who like it, just shhhh. Look away. This is the only site I have to say this on 💀 interact with the things you enjoy, not the things you hate PLEASE IM BEGGING.

And I swear I do block people, my block list is sitting at over 1000 rn I just don't like how preachy and mean spirited some can be

To the zaqa anons that requested another stepfather like James, I hope you like him!!!


♡ Pfp made by Xei Sama

♡ Watermark by nonpractical
